name: Move-Out Inspection
description: Maintenance coordinates possession confirmation, move-out condition evidence, damage review, and deposit handoff with human approval before deductions, resident notices, vendor work, or PMS writes.

stages.name: Confirm Possession
stages.description: Confirm possession, key return, and inspection readiness before condition review.

steps.title: Normalize move-out inspection facts
steps.instructions: Normalize property, unit, resident, lease, move-out date, possession state, key return, utility state, forwarding contact, prior move-in baseline refs, and missing facts. Unknown possession or evidence fields must remain null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize move-out inspection inputs and missing-data flags. No resident sends, vendor actions, or AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Confirm inspection readiness
steps.instructions: Confirm possession is surrendered or flag needs_verification, identify any lockout/access issue, check whether a human or field inspector already owns the inspection, and surface conflicts before acting. Do not schedule, contact, dispatch, or write externally.
steps.dispatch_body: Confirm possession, access, and ownership before inspection work. No external sends or system writes.

stages.name: Assemble Condition Evidence
stages.description: Assemble move-out condition evidence and compare it to the baseline.

steps.title: Assemble move-out condition evidence
steps.instructions: Assemble room-by-room photos, videos, key/remote status, abandoned-property notes if any, utility meter notes if available, cleanliness, damage observations, baseline comparison refs, and missing evidence flags. Do not infer chargeability; unsupported items stay needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Assemble condition evidence and baseline comparison flags. No external sends and no system writes.

steps.title: Review condition evidence
steps.instructions: Review move-out condition evidence for completeness, fair wear-and-tear concerns, abandoned-property sensitivity, and missing baseline comparison before any damage packet, vendor work, or deposit deduction draft is prepared.
steps.human_prompt: Review move-out condition evidence before damage, vendor, or deposit action.

stages.name: Damage Review Packet
stages.description: Draft damage and vendor scope packets without committing charges or work.

steps.title: Draft damage review packet
steps.instructions: Draft a damage review packet with evidence-backed observations, possible repair categories, baseline comparison, unresolved gaps, suggested vendor scope if needed, and deposit-disposition caveats. Draft-only; do not create deductions, dispatch vendors, notify residents, or write to systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft damage review and possible scope packet only. No deductions, dispatch, sends, or system writes.

steps.title: Approve damage and scope packet
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, or hold before any damage classification, vendor work order, resident notice, deposit deduction recommendation, owner update, AppFolio write, or PropertyMeld action.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before damage, vendor, resident, owner, deposit, or system action.

stages.name: Deposit Handoff
stages.description: Stage approved inspection evidence for deposit disposition and make-ready planning.

steps.title: Stage approved inspection handoff
steps.instructions: Stage approved inspection evidence, damage review packet, unresolved needs_verification flags, possible make-ready scope refs, and deposit-disposition handoff notes. Do not send notices, post charges, dispatch vendors, or write to external systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved inspection handoff for deposit disposition and make-ready. No external sends or system writes.

steps.title: Record move-out inspection closeout
steps.instructions: Record possession status, evidence refs, approval source, unresolved gaps, deposit handoff state, and next owner. Internal audit only; do not contact resident, owner, vendor, or write to PMS/maintenance systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Record internal move-out inspection closeout and next owner. No external sends or system writes.
